description:
Product information:

Support your child’s posture development with our Smart Posture Corrector Device, designed specifically for kids and children. This intelligent wearable gently vibrates whenever your child slouches, helping them stay aware of their posture during study, screen time, or everyday activities.

Built with soft silicone and adjustable straps, this posture trainer ensures a snug, comfortable fit for growing children. It promotes healthier posture habits by providing gentle reminders in real time—no harsh corrections, no discomfort.

Key Features:
Designed for Children: Ergonomic and adjustable fit for kids of various ages and body types

Real-Time Posture Monitoring: Vibrates gently to alert your child when they start slouching

Safe and Comfortable: Made from soft, skin-friendly silicone that’s breathable and lightweight

USB Rechargeable: Convenient charging via USB; long-lasting battery for all-day wear

Easy to Use: Simple on/off design with clear instructions; no app or smartphone required

Discreet Wear: Slim design allows it to be worn under school uniforms or casual clothes

Benefits:
Helps children develop healthy posture habits from an early age

Encourages proper spinal alignment and reduces future posture-related issues

Ideal for use during homework, reading, or extended screen time

Non-invasive solution without need for physical therapy or intervention

Promotes confidence and comfort in standing tall and sitting properly

Specifications:
Material: Silicone

Color Options: Black, Orange

Product Size (straightened): 260 × 90 × 10 mm

Charging Voltage: 5V

Rated Current: 0.12A

Rated Power: 0.6W

Weight: Lightweight for all-day comfort

Strap: Adjustable to fit various child sizes

Battery: USB rechargeable lithium battery

What’s Included:
1 × Smart Posture Corrector Device

1 × USB Charging Cable

1 × User Manual
